name: Elegy Psalm
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Considered as a "Defense".{Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Grief}. For each stack of '{Grief}' {Metaphor} consumed, restore [Heal:Arg3] HP.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Inflict 1 stack of {Weakness} on all enemies. Considered as a "Defense". {Leap}: Switch to the {Grief} {Emotion} state. For each stack of {Grief} {Metaphor} consumed, restore [Heal:Arg3] HP.
